title: chalam #2492
definition:
1) to dream
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to dream (ordinary)
        1a2) to dream (prophetic)
        1a3) to dream (of false prophets)
    1b) (Hiphil) to dream
 2) to be healthy, be strong
    2a) (Qal) to be healthy
    2b) (Hiphil) to restore to health
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to be healthy or strong
